lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there. Why do you still bother having ships here? I mean - you're dead, what use are they to you?

lines.speaker: Ghost sailor
lines.text: We keep ships because we still need trade in Phasmatys. Every trader that comes to Phasmatys is made to worship the Ectofuntus, so that the Ectopower doesn't run out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, without traders to worship in the Temple you're history, right?
